# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

// app/Services/SMS.php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Twilio\Rest\Client;

class SMS
{
    private $accountSid;
    private $authToken;
    private $twilioPhoneNumber;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = Config::get('services.twilio.account_sid');
        $this->authToken = Config::get('services.twilio.auth_token');
        $this->twilioPhoneNumber = Config::get('services.twilio.phonenumber');

        if (!$this->accountSid || !$this->authToken) {
            throw new \Exception("Twilio credentials are not set in the config.");
        }
    }

    public function send($to, $message)
    {
        try {
            $client = new Client($this->accountSid, $this->authToken);
            $result = $client->messages
                ->create($to, array(
                    'from' => $this->twilioPhoneNumber,
                    'body' => $message,
                ));

            return $result->sid;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            // Log the error or throw a custom exception
            return null;
        }
    }

    public function sendVerificationCode($to, $code)
    {
        $message = "Your verification code is: $code";
        return $this->send($to, $message);
    }
}
